attributes.content:
## Overview

The Performance Review card gives the workspace a structured home for periodic review with goals, ratings, feedback, development plan.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Performance Review acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Contact]]** -- Performance Review often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Organization]]** -- Performance Review frequently sits inside an account, company, or team-level relationship context.
- **[[Task]]** -- Performance Review often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Performance Review can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Document]]** -- Performance Review can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Interview Feedback]]** -- Interview Feedback can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Performance Review.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Performance Review as the structured home for periodic review with goals, ratings, feedback, development plan and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Performance Review when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Performance Review stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Performance Review
cardInfo.summary: Periodic review with goals, ratings, feedback, development plan.
